occupation: CEO & Partner | Americas at ALTMRK OOH GROUP
headline: Partner & CEO Altermark || Partner OOH Capital || Board Member ABOOH
summary: Eat, sleep & breath : Out of Home

experiences.title: CEO & Partner | Americas
experiences.description:
Altermark: Specialist Out of Home Media Agency

Providing a boutique style connection with clients for all of their Out of Home needs. 
Providing face to face communication for strategy and execution. 
In-depth knowledge and experience with planning and buying Out of Home across the Americas : US Mexico, Caribbean, Central America & South America. 

Combining forces that generate over 35 years of experience in global out of home executions. 

Your Personal Shopper for all Out of Home media across the globe.

experiences.company: ABOOH - Associação Brasileira de Out of Home
experiences.title: Director of International Relations
experiences.description:
ABOOH – Associação Brasileira de Out of Home plays a central role in uniting, representing, and strengthening Brazil’s Out of Home industry—promoting best practices, innovation, education, and a regulatory environment that supports sustainable growth and credibility for the medium.

As Director of International Relations, my role is to connect ABOOH with global OOH associations and industry leaders, foster cross-market dialogue and knowledge exchange, and help advance conversations that drive industry evolution, collaboration, and regulation aligned with the future growth of Out of Home worldwide.

experiences.title: Partner
experiences.description: OOH Capital is a dedicated client-focused consultancy, that is a force for good, with the experience and ability to provide a truly global, holistic view of out of home media. OOH Capital comprises best-in-class executive talent who are committed to accelerating industry expansion and growth. OOH Capital advises businesses, cities, real estate owners and technology companies on the best ways to drive success and value within the out of home industry.

recommendations:
Terri Cameron

I was impressed with Claudia from the very beginning - professsional in understand her role, her clients' needs and potential business partners,  and  her sincere dedication tof her work .  Going beyond the 9-5 job, but living her career in achieving the very best for her clients.   Her personality provided the added bonus of working with a respective professsional and colleague with great spirit and enthusiasm.
